message:
refactor(app): extract PI_TEST_MODE env check from build_system_prompt

Make build_system_prompt() a pure function by accepting test_mode: bool
instead of reading PI_TEST_MODE from the environment internally. This
eliminates a thread-safety issue where concurrent tests using set_var()
to toggle the env var could race.

src/app.rs:
- Add test_mode: bool parameter to build_system_prompt()
- Remove internal std::env::var("PI_TEST_MODE") check

src/main.rs, src/bin/pi_debug.rs:
- Read PI_TEST_MODE env var locally and pass to build_system_prompt()

tests/e2e_tui.rs:
- Remove env var save/restore dance in build_vcr_system_prompt()
- Pass true directly as test_mode parameter

tests/main_cli_selection.rs:
- Pass false as test_mode to build_system_prompt()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
